rationale.reason: priority* = multiplicative weights from topBlogs/expandTopicsFrom/topTools; reducedClusters lower matching triples; pausedClusters skip exact slugs

weightsNote: Multipliers stack on base 1.0; final weight = platform*topic*intent*reduction * V173 * V174 * V181 (intent+topic revenue) * stale. Paused exact slugs skip generation.
